themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: President Trump's diplomatic engagements, particularly his visit to China and stance on the Iran war, have dominated right-wing media narratives across multiple countries. This theme reflects the global influence of Trump's policies and the shared focus on U.S. foreign relations among right-wing factions.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Intense coverage of Trump’s China visit, Iran war stance, and domestic policies like gas tax suspension.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Focus on Trump’s influence on Poland’s security policies, including potential U.S. troop relocations.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Discussion of Trump’s impact on Italy’s foreign policy, particularly regarding Iran and China.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Coverage of Trump’s policies as a reference point for Argentina’s economic and diplomatic strategies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Analysis of Trump’s diplomatic moves and their implications for France’s far-right agenda.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties in Spain, Italy, and Sweden are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and public resources. This theme highlights a transnational trend of exclusionary rhetoric and policy proposals.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Campaigns on 'national priority' in Andalusia, targeting immigration and social aid access.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Debates over migration policies and national identity, including opposition to EU asylum pacts.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Opposes forced mixed housing, citing safety concerns in immigrant-heavy areas.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Focus on migration control and national sovereignty in policy discussions.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK’s significant gains in local elections have reshaped the UK’s political landscape, challenging traditional parties and influencing national discourse. This theme underscores the growing influence of far-right movements in Europe and their potential to disrupt established political systems.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Wins control of multiple councils, reshaping local governance and challenging Labour and Conservatives.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Coverage of Reform UK’s rise as a model for U.S. conservative movements.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Analysis of Reform UK’s impact on European far-right dynamics.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations and scandals involving high-profile figures in far-right governments have become a dominant theme, undermining public trust and sparking internal conflicts. This pattern reflects a broader trend of governance challenges within right-wing administrations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Scandals involving Manuel Adorni and Karina Milei erode public trust in Milei’s government.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Allegations of luxury spending and corruption in Orbán’s government fuel public discontent.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Investigations into Zbigniew Ziobro and other party figures highlight internal corruption.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Internal conflicts and legal challenges over contract awards and campaign financing.

themes.title: Hungary’s political transition dominates coverage
themes.blurb: The political transition in Hungary, marked by the rise of Péter Magyar’s Tisza Party and the end of Viktor Orbán’s 16-year rule, has captured significant attention. This theme highlights the broader implications of Hungary’s shift for European politics and far-right governance.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Intense focus on the formation of the new Tisza government and its policy priorities.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Coverage of Hungary’s transition as a case study for populist governance.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Analysis of Hungary’s political shift and its impact on regional alliances.
